edgeCases: Shell-unsafe and path-escape feature slugs are rejected before any disk side effect
SyncIgnores is idempotent across .gitignore, .eslintignore, .prettierignore, .dockerignore, .rgignore, and tsconfig.json
Malformed tsconfig.json is treated as no-op (no crash); missing exclude key is added; string exclude is repaired to array
Merger fails fast on dirty main without invoking the validator
Clean merge removes the worktree; text conflicts and validate failures keep it for the Steward
Spec-conflict detection flags contradictory Given/Then across in-flight worktrees, ignores same-owner self-comparisons, and tolerates missing specs/ directories
MergeOutcome surfaces StewardReason and StewardHint so the caller can route to the Merge Steward without auto-dispatch yet
